description: Unique panel observation identifier: year + period + panel entity.
Numeric order of fiscal reporting period.
Fiscal indicator/entity used as panel unit.
Mean extracted numeric value for the entity in a year-period.
Median extracted numeric value for the entity in a year-period.
Sum of extracted numeric values for the entity in a year-period.
Number of long-format source values aggregated into the panel observation.
Number of source files supporting the panel observation.
Number of source sheets supporting the panel observation.
Robust z-score of value_mean relative to the same fiscal entity over time.
Absolute robust z-score, useful as an anomaly-strength feature.
Min-max normalized value_mean within the same fiscal entity.
